name: Hamburger Patties
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Shape the mixture into 4 patties, each about 3 1/2 inches in diameter.
3. Place the patties in an 8 x 8 x 2-inch square baking dish.
4. If desired, brush each patty with additional catsup.
5. Cover the dish loosely and microwave on high (100%) for 5 minutes.
6. Turn the dish one-quarter turn.
7. Continue microwaving until the patties are done, about 2 to 3 minutes.
